name: TRAIGA Safe Harbor
outcome: Gated three-step chain for the Texas Responsible AI Governance Act affirmative defense. Step 1 flags TRAIGA applicability and intentional prohibited-use assertions (gate: a prohibited use exits immediately, no defense evidence assembled). Step 2 (shipped map_nist_ai_rmf_functions) maps supplied controls to NIST AI RMF coverage (gate: Minimal or Partial coverage band exits, Substantial or Comprehensive continues). Step 3 assembles the affirmative-defense evidence pack. Evidence toward the Tex. Bus. & Com. Code §553.106 statutory defense, never a guarantee the defense succeeds.
